title: British couple return to village at heart of deadly Spanish wildfire
summary_full: At least 13 people, including five believed to be Britons, were killed by Thursday's wildfire in Spain's Almeria province.
summary_public: At least 13 people, including five believed to be Britons, were killed by Thursday's wildfire in Spain's Almeria province.
